jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Cello
jsonLd.description:
We at Cello are looking for an experienced Visual Merchandiser based out of Visakhapatnam. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Cello:
Cello is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Category Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cello!
